title: Season-bound Survival
description: A cozy yet challenging survival experience with dynamic seasons, immersive progression, and handcrafted exploration. Built for adventurers who crave atmosphere and strategy.
body:
Seasonbound Survival — A Realistic, Weather-Driven Minecraft Adventure
Embark on a grounded survival journey with Seasonbound Survival, a modpack built around immersive environmental realism, seasonal hazards, and dynamic exploration. Featuring:
- 🌊 Aquacraft 2: Dive into modular sailing, realistic buoyancy, and oceanic adventures
- 🌪️ Weather & Storms: Tackle dynamic tornadoes, temperature extremes, and seasonal climate shifts
- 🌿 Survival Depth: Manage thirst, hunger, body heat, and health with Survive, Better Burning, and KeepItHealthy
- 🏞️ Biome Richness: Explore enhanced worldgen from Tectonic, Regions Unexplored, and YUNG’s Biome suite
- 🍲 Agricultural Flavor: Grow and cook with Farmer’s Delight, Croptopia, and Spoiled
- 🐾 Fauna & Companions: Encounter diverse wildlife via Alex’s Mobs, Naturalist, and Critters & Companions
- ⚔️ Grounded Combat: Experience movement and battle realism with Physics Mod and Better Combat
Designed for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge), this modpack centers around seasonal survival and natural immersion. Whether you're sailing into a storm or building a homestead in a frozen jungle, Seasonbound Survival challenges you to thrive against the elements.
